functions.name: RUN
functions.description: AI-transform each cell with an instruction (local LLM). Example: =XAI.RUN(A2:A50, "extract the pin code")

functions.name: TAG
functions.description: Classify each cell Yes/No against a criterion (local LLM). Example: =XAI.TAG(B2:B500, "is this a corporate customer?")

functions.name: SPLIT
functions.description: Split each cell into named parts; spills columns with a header row (local LLM). Example: =XAI.SPLIT(A2:A50, "street | city | pin")

functions.name: ASK
functions.description: Ask a question about a range; the answer's numbers come from a computed evidence table, never invented. First row of the range must be headers. Example: =XAI.ASK("total amount per city?", A1:D200)

functions.name: VALIDATE
functions.description: Deterministic format check per cell — regex, zero AI. Formats: gst, pan, aadhaar, email, phone, ifsc. Example: =XAI.VALIDATE(C2:C100, "pan")

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: gst | pan | aadhaar | email | phone | ifsc

functions.name: MATCH
functions.description: KYC name similarity 0-100 between two cells or two equal ranges, deterministic. Example: =XAI.MATCH(A2, B2)
